name: agent-integration-patterns
install_doc: pip install -r requirements.txt && set OPENAI_API_KEY + GITHUB_TOKEN in .env
notes: Educational benchmark comparing two OpenAI tool-call patterns: 'RPC' (SDK-wrapped function hides pagination/filtering from agent) vs 'REST' (raw HTTP tool, agent must drive all logic). Measures token cost and steps-to-completion for the same GitHub-issues task. No hook, proxy, or compaction layer — this is not a token-optimizer at all. It is a research demo showing that high-level SDK tools reduce agent token consumption vs raw REST calls. Cache-breaking: every run creates a fresh OpenAI conversation with no caching. Target agents: OpenAI gpt-4o-mini only.
